title: AI-only product news must stay irrelevant when no legal-regulatory context exists

candidate.title: Startup launches new AI chatbot for cooking recipes
candidate.text: A startup announced an artificial intelligence assistant that suggests recipes.

expectedOutput.reason: AI terms were present, but legal-regulatory context was too weak.

originalFailureReason: Representative false-positive pattern for the legal-intelligence monitor: AI product news without legal/regulatory context should not enter review.
